description: Your university rocketry team has static-fired an experimental solid rocket motor and generated a custom thrust curve file at /home/ga/Documents/motors/SRAD_C40.eng. Using OpenRocket, load the baseline rocket design from /home/ga/Documents/rockets/srad_start.ork and configure the motor mount to use the custom motor (Manufacturer: 'SRAD_Team', Designation: 'SRAD_C40'). Run a flight simulation and save the modified design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/srad_simulated_rocket.ork. Document the simulated Apogee (meters) and Maximum Velocity (m/s) in a motor characterization report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/srad_flight_report.txt.
